overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a mountain trail that transitions from grassy forested hills to a snow-covered alpine pass. The overcast winter lighting creates a cool, desaturated atmosphere as the character ascends into higher elevations.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with coniferous forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through grassy terrain with two swords strapped to back

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
dense evergreen trees covering the hillside
scattered pine trees on the sloping terrain
distant snow-covered mountain ridge visible ahead
brownish tall grass lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a grassy mountain trail with the character walking away from the camera. Dense coniferous forests flank the path on both sides while snow-capped peaks loom in the distant center. The ground is mostly clear dirt with dry grass vegetation, establishing the lower elevation before the snow line.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley with patchy snow coverage

events.description: snow patches begin appearing on the ground and path surface
path begins to ascend more steeply into the alpine zone

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the environment transitions from grass to mixed snow terrain

entered.detail: hillside becoming increasingly covered with white snow
white snow beginning to cover the dirt path in patches

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the lush forest gives way to sparser vegetation and snow begins to dominate the landscape. The path remains mostly dirt but snow patches appear with increasing frequency. The terrain gradually steepens as the trail enters a mountain valley, with the distant peaks now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain pass with rocky alpine terrain

events.description: trail becomes completely covered in deep snow, entering high alpine zone

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through deep snow on a narrow mountain trail between rocky outcrops

entered.detail: large snow-covered boulders and rocky formations lining the path
white snow-filled valley between mountain peaks ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending a steep snow-covered mountain pass. The dirt path has completely disappeared under deep snow, and the surroundings are dominated by white snow and grey rocky outcrops. The trail winds between snow banks as the character continues the uphill journey into the alpine wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a grassy forest path into a frozen alpine pass. It begins with the character walking away from the camera through dense coniferous forests and dry grass, with snow-capped peaks looming in the far distance. As the character progresses, the lush greenery gives way to sparser vegetation and the terrain steepens, while patches of snow begin to appear more frequently across the dirt path. The scene then shifts as the trail enters a mountain valley, with the distant peaks moving to the left and the landscape becoming increasingly dominated by white. Finally, the dirt path disappears entirely under deep snow and grey rocky outcrops as the character ascends a steep, winding pass into the alpine wilderness.
